ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the stock exchange */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock associated with the price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on that date, if any */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Stock split coefficient for that date, if any */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES daily_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the price entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change in price data */,
  "previous_open_price" REAL /* Previous opening price before the change */,
  "previous_close_price" REAL /* Previous closing price before the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES daily_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume entry */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over a specified period (e.g., 30 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
